nasb.text: These are the things which defile the man; but to eat with unwashed hands does not defile the man.”

esv.text: These are what defile a person. But to eat with unwashed hands does not defile anyone.”

cnv.text: 這些才會使人污穢，不洗手吃飯卻不會這樣。”

ccb.text: 这些东西才使人污秽。不洗手吃饭并不会使人污秽。”

csbs.text: 这些才会使人污秽；而不洗手就吃饭，不会使人污秽。”
